payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: An hour, yeah, so you can still be under that effect.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Tread gently and see if they react.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you have Pass Without a Trace, Vex?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I do. But, Keyleth, the minute we start fighting, they will notice us, and then they'll attack us from behind.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So it would be best to get their attention now when everything's quiet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We also don't want to waste all of our abilities on undead.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's only two, maybe four of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's four of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That we see.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Why don't we just tread that way, and we'll see what happens.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's exactly what we're saying.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What could happen?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I guess I use Pass Without a Trace on all of us.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You did.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Did we already have it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did we already have it? From last time?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As long as you're maintaining your concentration, how long does it last for? Concentration? I believe it--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It holds for up to an hour.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Anyone who wishes to immediately go into battle now, let's roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: On the Ice Storm Candle. All affected must make a dexterity saving throw, DC 12, or suffer 4d6 cold damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a fail and a save. And it's half damage on success?

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Half damage on success.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Great. Okay, so one of them failed and one of them saved. So go ahead and roll 4d6 damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Dang. I think that's a good way to start.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Thank you, thank you, thank you. Oh boy. Three, six, nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nine? Okay, nine and five cold damage to each. So (bang) it blasts open. Oh, and a dexterity check for your buddy, who makes it! So, Fatty Arbuckle actually walks out of there with a mere five points of cold damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Nice, Fatty!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Out of ice and frost. His busted-open rib cage, though, he did suffer...

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Super duper!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Putting on the Ritz!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Did suffer seven damage from the impact of this weapon. So Fatty Arbuckle, pretty damaged, but still standing there just going (snarling).

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Keep standing, Fatty, you can do it! I love you, Fatty!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Is everyone just going to sit back at this, or--?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, we should probably attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's up to you. Or you can watch this horrible bludgeoning of this skeleton in the teeth of death.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: When I see the salamander take out the big, shiny sharp thing, I go into a rage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I hide.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Travis, I assume you're going to be rushing in there, then?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: (laughs) And as you say that, you recognize this entity and blurt out its name, just instinctually as you get a proper view of it. One of the many denizens of the fire elemental plane, this is an efreeti, it is a fire genie.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, seven, thought I got you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Nobody cares, Marisha.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I know, I'll just... be back here... caboose.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There we go. So right before Grog is Keyleth. Great. All right. Top of the combat round.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, nope. Not leading.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shitty initiative roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's going to be fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He's cut things out of cardboard. This doesn't look fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: There was planning. There was a thought process.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, towers.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There was an instructables involved in this. This is just really-- we're doomed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, no, he was down in the play zone before!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Tell me who wants to roll an arcana check as you see this entity rising up--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, absolutely.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will, as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For people who are proficient with it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Two.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, with disadvantage, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So tired.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Whoa! Get out of here, dragonborn!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Look at the big brain on Gern.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: I'm very smart.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That's the end of Vex's turn. It is now the elementals' turns.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. Mark the efreeti.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And then I'm going to use my Longbow of the Sky Sentinel. And I'm going to shoot him three times!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That first one probably does not succeed. It is a 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That does not hit, nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What about 23?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That does hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right. How about... mega miss. So one of those hits, because I'm a loser.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Streaking past, and the third one hits as he's holding the flame balls in his hands. Seeing the small impact, he just glares at you though the impact.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You need to sacrifice a small mammal. Maybe we can find a squirrel or something.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: A pagan ritual.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I can hook you up. I have a kit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughter) Why am I not surprised?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 17 points of damage and that's it because I suck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17 points of damage. And you are hiding behind the tree?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I am hiding behind the tree.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So you can move around to this side of the elemental, pushing past your allies, whip around, you get a little bit of a view through the fire and flames swirling around you. You concentrate and release a burst of cold energy. It might not be close enough.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep. At the top of your turn, because you're now on fire, you take six points of fire damage. You're just wreathed in fire, all around. It's a bad, bad Sunday for Gern.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Oh boy. I'm trying to find something that won't destroy-- How close is everyone to me? Everyone's pretty close.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No one's near the big guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: No, but I'm standing right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Here, you can see it right here. You're that little red ring right there, and then your two followers are right there. If you have anything that goes in a cube, you'd be fine. Do you have anything that's a cube shot?

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: And which way am I facing?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Whichever way you want to be facing.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: I mean, I guess-- I'd like to run around and throw another Cone of Cold aimed at that guy, and then up at the prick hovering above everyone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This direction, you mean?

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Aye!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: But the flames do eventually go out, over the next five to six seconds or so. What would you like Stimpy to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is Coral.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Is there like snow or ice on the ground?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is behind the elemental, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Can he scoop some up?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The zombie can take one action, unfortunately, it's not a super intelligent creature. One or the other.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: All right, then, I suppose he just has to roll on top of me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys glance over out of the corner of your eye and you see is the dragonborn all of a sudden jumps to the ground, sprawled out, snow angel style.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Do it! Just do it already! What are you waiting for?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As this undead begins flailing about on top of his body. You're starting to get elements of decaying goo and--

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Yes, it's fucking terrible!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Total of eight fire damage just from slamming and attacking this salamander. All righty, that brings us to the very end. It is now the salamander's turn. After being hacked twice by you, Grog, it turns around, takes its trident in both hands, looks at you with this horrible snarl. You can see now these glistening, almost ruby-like sharp teeth in its wide grin. (snarl) These long catfish-like tendrils that waft off its face as it slams down the spear towards you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: However, because you've taken... With each strike within melee of the salamander's heated body, it's so intense by its proximity that you suffer six points of fire damage from the first melee attack against you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: She gave me resistance, so halved to three?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Halved to two.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Halved to two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The other one would be 12, so you take six.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Eight total.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Ten. Trying to recall and hum the song that Scanlan once sang to you, naught but ten minutes before, you don't recall it much at all, and it comes out (tuneless humming).

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. As the skeleton leaps down into the worm (crash), just flat laid out, cracking part of its pelvis...

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Dancing without music.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep. No music whatsoever.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Is the zombie like (zombie groaning). The tip of his arm falls off at the ulna.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Pop and lock! Pop and lock!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. I'm going to go ahead and--

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: These guys are great!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to ask you to go ahead and roll a performance check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We never do those!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I feel really bad that I killed Carol now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that was almost bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Wait, plus, plus--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you have inspiration!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You do!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Use it!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Use a d10!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is the time.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Oh. So seven, plus performance plus one, eight, and then a d10.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Roll the d10, add it.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Jesus Christ. Ten.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Technically, a second spell can only be as high as second level. You used two spells in one round.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, snap. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And yeah, that's it. That'll be my--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can still move after that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good! Okay, good, thank you for saving me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So the bolt arcs past, go ahead.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: I saw that, it was great!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, for once! Thank you! Thank you, it was for you!

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Much appreciated!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Five, no. And a 12 plus three, 15, no. Both fail their saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so 8d6?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 8d6 points of lightning damage to both of them. It's a wonderful display, Gern.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I ship Scanlan and Gern.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Shh, guys, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 33, nice roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that Lightning Bolt was so big. And wide!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's the width that really does it.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: It really does. It's not so much the length.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's the girth of Gern.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And I will re-inspire Gern. Oh, wait, you're still injured, aren't you?

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will heal Gern.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Please.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: With another Healing Word. This time at third level.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, it's currently being surrounded by a swirl of Hex shadow and looking around very confused and wondering why it got up in the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will heal Gern.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Please.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: With another Healing Word. This time at third level.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Technically, a second spell can only be as high as second level. You used two spells in one round.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's still very romantic, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'll do a 2nd-level Healing Word, and I will sing to him, because I'm running out of things that rhyme with his name: (singing) Gern down for what! (EDM beat) Gern down for what! That's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Might I remind you I am unable to get an erection at the moment?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: However, in spite of that, the blue pill does give you ten additional hit points healed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did the skeleton and the zombie start dancing better, after that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it actually does pick up their pace a little bit now that they have a backtrack.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: What is the elemental doing while they're dancing?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You leap in the air and jump on it again and as you do the orb (sinking noise) and just slowly, over the next 15 seconds shove it down to the point where you're over the orb on the very top, as you can feel the spell about to dissipate.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's as far as it goes?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What do you want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: I'd like to try to cast a memory spell on it, if possible.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Well, you've already cast a 5th-level spell twice, how many 5th-level spells can you cast per day?

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, unfortunately you're out of 5th-level slots.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: Could I cast it on you to forget that I've already cast it twice?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan, how much time do we have with this bubble?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: A minute, but about 30 seconds have gone by.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you're getting down to about the 40-second mark.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can I put myself out while all of this is happening?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you can do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can he push down?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can jump onto it and begin to push down.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS HARDWICK
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to push down with all my might, to try to get him down on the ground.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All righty. (two impacts) Just as it manages to cauterize the wounds from the Disintegrate spell, both bullets blast into its torso, and you can see it's now, thinking the height advantage would be helpful, after being locked in a hamster ball and now being repeatedly blasted from every which way, it's not enjoying its current experience by any means.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's 22.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 22 hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And that's, what's the saving throw for that? Strength throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Strength? 23.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Aw, really?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's fine, he'll just take his damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Little bitch. Plus 1d6, don't forget.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes, thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Wow, Disintegrate spell fucked him up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's 17 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to shoot again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Is this with your pistol?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, just with the pistol right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And what's your first range increment on that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The pistol?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. 1,200 for Bad News.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your first range increment.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm sharpshooter, I have no range increment.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's right. Good call. All right, so fire again.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Range increments are for-- We don't do that here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's a 31 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits, roll damage. Scanlan, you're up next, by the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And that's 16 points of damage.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Taking another 21 points of fire damage. Reduced to ten. The druids look around and give a nod of acceptance. All of them acknowledge you, who they have not met and don't understand quite where you came from or why you're here. One of them, who is currently missing an arm on one hand. Dark, weathered skin, long jet black hair cruising down to the middle of his back, approaches you and his one right arm he puts on the shoulder and says, into your eyes, "I do not know you, friend, but you have come to our aid at an hour when we really required it."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nice job, Vax!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Where am I, am I near her, on the ground?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She would be back here. You're on the ground, right next to a dancing skeleton.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I moved up, I moved up. I would be over there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You would be part of the ritual. But you fell next to the dancing skeleton.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I look at the skeleton, I look at her. I look at the skeleton, I look at her. I'm an idiot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, no, I already knew that. It's fine. You did good. You did good. I reach down and I help him on his feet. How bad are you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm pretty bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I Cure Wounds, level four.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, cool, do that. I'm going to walk out of the lava now. (laughter)
